guidance: Teach a repeatable framework or mental model a service-business owner can apply this week. Name the steps concretely. Premium and confident, never generic.
evidence_note: Grounded in Black Arrow's method and general operating logic; no invented stats.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Authority / Frameworks' was the most under-served eligible category (target 25%, recent 18%).
post_rationale: Carousels lead saves/depth for authority content per 2026 benchmarks, and this turns Black Arrow's four-system method into a named, testable framework distinct from the self-scoring mental model and forensic diagnostic already shipped.
